stage1_reason: Commit explicitly removes single-byte netdev->dev_addr writes and introduces arcnet_set_addr helper using dev_addr_set API, indicating kernel API change enforcement.
stage2_reason: Driver commit removes single-byte netdev->dev_addr writes and introduces arcnet_set_addr helper using dev_addr_set API. Kernel commit 48eab831ae8b creates the dev_addr_set helper API that the driver now adopts, making it the clear causal API change.
